messages.content: 写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:Bright, family, as fast as, wind, pick up

1. Bright - 明亮的
- The sun is very bright today!
- This light bulb is very bright.
- My new shoes are bright pink.

2. Family - 家庭
- Peppa's family has a picnic in the park.
- George loves spending time with his family.
- Daddy Pig works hard to provide for his family.

3. As fast as - 跟...一样快
- Susie Sheep can run as fast as a cheetah.
- Peppa can swim as fast as a fish.
- Danny Dog can eat his dinner as fast as a rocket.

4. Wind - 风
- The wind is blowing very hard today.
- The leaves on the trees are swaying in the wind.
- Peppa and her friends like flying kites in the wind.

5. Pick up - 捡起来
- George picks up his toy dinosaur from the floor.
- Daddy Pig helps Peppa to pick up the toys in her room.
- Mummy Pig asks Peppa to pick up some groceries from the store.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:windy, quite, strong, very well, stuck

1. Windy - 有风的
- It's very windy outside today, be careful not to get blown away!
- Peppa's kite is flying high in the windy sky.
- Daddy Pig's hat keeps flying off his head in the windy weather.

2. Quite - 相当地，非常
- Peppa is quite good at jumping in muddy puddles.
- George is quite small for his age.
- Daddy Pig is quite good at fixing things around the house.

3. Strong - 强壮的，有力的
- Grandpa Pig is very strong for his age.
- Peppa's toy robot is too strong, it broke her doll's teapot.
- Daddy Pig needs to be strong to carry all the shopping bags.

4. Very well - 非常好，做得好
- Peppa did very well in her school performance.
- Mummy Pig is teaching George to brush his teeth very well.
- Daddy Pig cooks very well, he makes delicious pancakes.

5. Stuck - 卡住的，粘住的
- Peppa's toy car is stuck in the mud, they need to push it out.
- George's toy plane is stuck in a tree, they need to get it down.
- Daddy Pig's key is stuck in the lock, he can't open the door.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:Nonsense, rescue, suppose, wash

1. Nonsense - 废话，胡说
- Peppa thinks that talking vegetables is nonsense.
- George thinks that Daddy Pig's jokes are nonsense.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa that crying for no reason is nonsense.

2. Rescue - 援救
- Fireman Sam is always ready to rescue people in danger.
- Peppa and her friends pretend to be rescue workers and save the day!
- Daddy Pig tells Peppa that he will always be there to rescue her if she needs it.

3. Suppose - 假设，猜想
- Peppa and George suppose that the moon is made of cheese.
- Mummy Pig supposes that it will rain today, so she brings an umbrella.
- Daddy Pig supposes that they need more bread, so he goes to the bakery to buy some.

4. Wash - 洗
- Peppa and George wash their hands before eating.
- Daddy Pig washes the car to make it clean and shiny.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa to wash her face before going to bed.

5.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:Bring, picnic, blanket, lemonade, tomato,

1. Bring - 带来，拿来
- Peppa brings her favorite toy to school every day.
- Daddy Pig is going to bring his special sauce to the barbecue.
- Mummy Pig asks George to bring her a pen from her desk.

2. Picnic - 野餐
- Peppa and her family have a picnic in the park with sandwiches and lemonade.
- George's favorite part of a picnic is the watermelon.
- Peppa and her friends plan a picnic with lots of yummy treats.

3. Blanket - 毛毯，毯子
- Peppa and her family take a blanket to sit on during their picnic.
- George snuggles up with his favorite soft blanket at bedtime.
- Daddy Pig uses a blanket to keep warm while watching TV.

4. Lemonade - 柠檬水
- Peppa and her friends drink cold lemonade on a hot day.
- Daddy Pig is in charge of making the perfect pitcher of lemonade for the family picnic.
- Mummy Pig shows Peppa and George how to squeeze fresh lemons to make lemonade.

5. Tomato - 番茄
- Peppa and her family grow their own juicy tomatoes in their garden.
- George doesn't like tomatoes, but he loves tomato sauce on his pizza.
- Mummy Pig puts fresh sliced tomatoes on her sandwiches at the picnic.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:tease, homemade, spot, outdoors, exercise

1. Tease - 嘲笑，取笑
- George sometimes teases Peppa by hiding her toys.
- Peppa learns not to tease her friends because it can hurt their feelings.
- Daddy Pig tells Peppa that teasing is not nice and they should always be kind to each other.

2. Homemade - 自制的，家里做的
- Mummy Pig makes delicious homemade cookies for Peppa and George.
- Daddy Pig builds a homemade toy car for the children to play with.
- Peppa and George make homemade cards for their friends and family.

3. Spot - 地点，地块
- Peppa and her family choose a perfect spot to have their picnic.
- Daddy Pig finds a good spot to set up his telescope to look at the stars.
- Peppa and her friends like to explore different spots in the park to play in.

4. Outdoors - 户外，户外的
- Peppa and her family love spending time outdoors in the fresh air.
- Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George camping in the great outdoors.
- Mummy Pig arranges an outdoor treasure hunt for Peppa and her friends.

5. Exercise - 锻炼，运动
- Peppa and her friends exercise by doing yoga in their playgroup.
- Daddy Pig says that it's important to get plenty of exercise to stay healthy.
- Mummy Pig takes Peppa and George for a walk in the park as a form of exercise.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:nap, certainly, even, sleepy, pond,

1. Nap - 小睡，午睡
- Peppa and George like to take a nap after lunch.
- Daddy Pig sometimes falls asleep while reading Peppa a bedtime story.
- Mummy Pig suggests that they take a nap while waiting for the rain to stop.

2. Certainly - 当然，肯定
- Peppa certainly knows how to count to ten.
- Daddy Pig certainly loves his morning cup of tea.
- Mummy Pig certainly thinks that Peppa and George are growing up too fast.

3. Even - 甚至，连...也
- Peppa and her friends like to play outside even when it's cold.
- George can even count to five all by himself now.
- Daddy Pig says that even he needs help sometimes.

4. Sleepy - 困倦的，想睡的
- Peppa feels sleepy after a long day of playing.
- George sometimes gets too sleepy during his bath time.
- Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig not to play loud music at bedtime as it might make the children too sleepy.

5. Pond - 池塘
- Peppa likes to feed the ducks at the pond near their house.
- George thinks that the pond in the park is where the crocodiles live.
- Daddy Pig teaches Peppa and George about the different creatures that live in ponds.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:feed, the rest of, left over, What a fuss, wasp

1. Feed - 喂养，喂食
- Peppa and George like to feed their pet goldfish every morning.
- Daddy Pig feeds the chickens in their backyard and collects fresh eggs.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa to remember to feed her toy unicorn.

2. The rest of - 剩下的，其他的
- Peppa eats some of the strawberries and leaves the rest of them for her friends.
- Daddy Pig drinks some of his tea and leaves the rest of it on the table.
- Mummy Pig reminds Peppa to save some of her snacks for the rest of the day.

3. Left over - 剩余的，余下的
- Peppa's family makes soup with the left over vegetables from dinner.
- Daddy Pig saves the left over wood from a woodworking project for a future project.
- Mummy Pig puts the left over cake in the fridge for a tasty snack later.

4. What a fuss - 真是麻烦，太嚷嚷了
- Peppa thinks that her little brother George is making too much of a fuss.
- Daddy Pig gets annoyed when Peppa and George make a fuss about cleaning their room.
- Mummy Pig tells the children not to make a big fuss over small things.

5. Wasp - 黄蜂
- Peppa and George are scared of the wasps that fly around their picnic.
- Daddy Pig tells Peppa to be careful and not to touch any wasps.
- Mummy Pig suggests putting a piece of cucumber on the picnic table to keep the wasps away.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下: Go away, stay still, away, get off, pest+

1. Go away - 走开，离开
- Peppa tells the spider to go away and not to scare George.
- Daddy Pig asks the kids to go away and play quietly while he works on a project.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa and George to go away from the TV and go play outside.

2. Stay still - 保持不动
- Peppa tells George to stay still while she ties his shoelaces.
- Daddy Pig tells the children to stay still while he takes their picture.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa to stay still while she brushes her hair.

3. Away - 离开，远离的
- Peppa and her family go away on a holiday to the beach.
- Daddy Pig's office is far away from their house, so he has to take a long journey to go to work.
- Mummy Pig asks Peppa to stay away from the hot stove while she cooks.

4. Get off - 下来，放下
- Peppa tells George to get off her toy car and play with his own toys.
- Daddy Pig tells the children to get off the sofa and go play outside.
- Mummy Pig asks Peppa to get off the counter and stop climbing on it.

5. Pest - 讨厌的人，害虫
- Peppa thinks that her little brother George is being a pest by following her around.
- Daddy Pig says that the snails in their garden are pests because they eat their vegetables.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa to be careful not to get stung by any pests like bees or wasps.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下: believe, manage, hang on, slice, most, See you next time

1. Believe - 相信，信任
- Peppa believes that fairies exist and live in the garden.
- George doesn't believe that his toy dinosaur can talk.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa to believe in herself and try her best.

2. Manage - 管理，处理
- Daddy Pig needs to manage his time well to balance work and family time.
- Peppa helps Mummy Pig manage the grocery shopping list.
- George wants to manage his own bedtime routine.

3. Hang on - 等一会儿，坚持下去
- Peppa tells George to hang on tight while they ride the rollercoaster.
- Daddy Pig tells the children to hang on to each other's hands while they cross the street.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa to hang on and keep trying when she is learning something new.

4. Slice - 切片，切开
- Peppa enjoys helping Mummy Pig slice the vegetables for dinner.
- Daddy Pig slices the cake into even pieces for the family to enjoy.
- Peppa asks for a slice of bread with jam for her breakfast.

5. Most - 大多数的，大部分的
- Peppa and her friends like to play most of the day outside.
- Daddy Pig says that most of the time, things do not go as planned.
- Mummy Pig suggests that most of the family chores can be done together as a team.

6. See you next time - 下次见，再见
- Peppa and George say goodbye to their friends, "See you next time!"
- Daddy Pig tells Peppa and George, "Have fun! See you next time!"
- Mummy Pig says goodbye to the neighbor, "Lovely to see you! See you next time!"
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:Tidy, attic, musical, instruments, dusty,

1. Tidy - 整洁的，整理
- Peppa and George like to keep their playroom tidy by putting away their toys.
- Mummy Pig asks Daddy Pig to tidy up the garage and organize his tools.
- Peppa and her friends help tidy up the park after their picnic.

2. Attic - 阁楼，顶楼储藏室
- Peppa and her family explore the attic and find some old toys and clothes.
- Daddy Pig goes up to the attic to find his old camera to take pictures of the family.
- Mummy Pig stores old photos and memories in a box in the attic.

3. Musical instruments - 音乐器
- Peppa and her friends learn how to play musical instruments in their music class.
- Daddy Pig plays the piano while Peppa and George sing along.
- Mummy Pig teaches Peppa and George how to play the drums and guitar.

4. Dusty - 满是灰尘的
- Peppa and her family clean the house and get rid of all the dusty cobwebs.
- Daddy Pig finds an old book in the attic, but it's too dusty to read.
- Mummy Pig tells Peppa to wear a mask when cleaning the dusty corners of the room.

5. Instruments - 器具，工具
- Peppa and George pretend to be scientists and use different instruments to measure things.
- Daddy Pig fixes the bike with his tools and instruments in his workshop.
- Mummy Pig shows Peppa and George all the different kitchen instruments she uses to cook and bake.
写出下列单词的词义，并用peppa pig的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下:violin, Bravo, hold, be meant to do, accordion

1. Violin - 小提琴
- Peppa learns how to play the violin in her music class.
- Daddy Pig introduces Peppa to famous violin players like Bach and Vivaldi.
- Mummy Pig plays the piano while Peppa and George sing and play the violin.

2. Bravo - 好极了，好样的
- Peppa and her friends clap and say "bravo" after their music performance.
- Daddy Pig tells Peppa and George "bravo!" after they finish their painting.
- Mummy Pig says "bravo" to her friend who just finished a challenging task.

3. Hold - 握住，抓住
- Peppa asks Daddy Pig to hold her hand while they cross the street.
- George learns to hold a crayon with his little fingers to draw.
- Mummy Pig teaches Peppa and George how to hold a fork and spoon properly.

4. Be meant to do - 被认为应该做的，应该做
- Peppa knows that she is meant to share her toys with her little brother.
- Daddy Pig says that he is meant to finish a project before the deadline.
- Mummy Pig reminds Peppa that brushing her teeth every
